creator: redrat@mail.ru
text:
Hello, Matthias!
On June, 17 2013 at 21:57 you wrote to bug-followup@FreeBSD.org:

MA> Does the build fail on a system without IPv6 support?
MA> If so, please provide build logs.
MA> Does leafnode fail during run-time on a system without IPv6 support?
MA> If so, please provide run-time logs.

I have to say 'sorry'! In fact, I can't see any problem with leafnode
built with IPv6 support on my servers which has 'WITHOUT_INET6=' in the
src.conf. I just saw a '--with-ipv6' option in the configure and thought
that it was added in the latest port update. Sorry again.

-- 
WBR, Alexey Markov.
